name: prototype_set_specification_bom_field
description: Copy/open a specification prototype, set a standard field on the first BOMObject record, save, reopen, and verify persistence.

args.source_path: absolute .grb prototype path, optional when prototype_id is provided
args.prototype_id: catalog id, optional when source_path is provided
args.text_value: new field text, defaults to empty string
args.add_record: true/false; when true, add a BOM record before setting the field (useful for empty specification prototypes)
